insufficient_credits.title: Oops! Running low on credits 😅
insufficient_credits.description: You don't have enough credits to {{actionType}} your {{engagementType}}.
insufficient_credits.description_plural: You don't have enough credits to {{actionType}} your {{formattedTotal}} {{engagementType}}.

consent_required.title: Consent Required
consent_required.description: Only {{available}} of {{total}} have given consent to be contacted.

no_consented_contacts.title: No Contacts Available
no_consented_contacts.description: None of your selected contacts have given consent to be contacted. All {{total}} {{engagementType}} have opted out.
no_consented_contacts.description_plural: None of your selected contacts have given consent to be contacted. All {{total}} {{engagementType_plural}} have opted out.
